events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical risk** — digging occurred without an 811/one-call locate, no utility markings or ticket documentation present. Required action is an immediate stop-work until a locate ticket is placed, positive responses are received from all utility owners, and marks are verified (with hand-exposure in tolerance zones) before excavation resumes.
